summary: **Status:** decided + implemented 2026-07-09 (Fable, kernel-data). Motivating case: `data/haiku-tier` (minted 2026-07-07 as an 84-record mid-stream snapshot while the volume runner was writing `records/`; corpus has since settled at 2,673 authored records).
title: Incremental re-mint: URN-stability guarantee vs re-mint cone (bead kernel-of-truth-lik)
